# <img src="https://raw.githubusercontent.com/schemacrawler/SchemaCrawler/main/schemacrawler-website/src/site/resources/images/schemacrawler_logo.png" height="100px" width="100px" valign="middle" /> SchemaCrawler - Homebrew Tap

> [!NOTE]
> * Please see the [SchemaCrawler website](https://www.schemacrawler.com/) for more details.
> * Use the [SchemaCrawler AI MCP Server](https://github.com/schemacrawler/SchemaCrawler-AI-MCP-Server-Usage) to get deep insights into your database
> * Explore the SchemaCrawler command-line with a [live online tutorial](https://killercoda.com/schemacrawler).


## Overview

This repository publishes the SchemaCrawler Homebrew Tap.

Install with:

```sh
# Install SchemaCrawler
brew tap schemacrawler/homebrew-tap
brew install --formula schemacrawler

# Check that SchemaCrawler is installed
schemacrawler --version
```
